hooks.command: FILE=$(python3 -c "import sys,re; m=re.search(r'\"file_path\": ?\"([^\"]+)\"', sys.stdin.read()); print(m.group(1) if m else '')" 2>/dev/null); RUFF=/Users/samueljeanlys/lakehouse-pipeline/venv/bin/ruff; [[ -n "$FILE" && "$FILE" == *.py ]] && "$RUFF" check --fix --unsafe-fixes "$FILE" && "$RUFF" format "$FILE"; true
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE "(rm -rf /|DROP TABLE|git push --force)" && echo BLOCKED && exit 1 || exit 0
